subtitle: Enterprise Platform Technical Brief for Investor Review

sections.title: System Architecture
sections.content:
ICE Colombia is a monolithic Next.js 15 application with a modular internal architecture. The platform processes the entire business lifecycle — from lead acquisition to student enrollment, from visa automation to payroll disbursement.

Architecture Stack

callout.title: Platform Scale
callout.content: 80,000+ lines of production TypeScript · 60+ database models · 50+ API namespaces · 17 portal modules · 8-tier RBAC · 15+ enums · 100+ indexed database fields · 80+ relations

sections.title: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
sections.content: The platform enforces fine-grained access control through 8 system roles, enabling secure multi-role, multi-location franchise operations.

rows: Full system access — all modules, all data, system configuration
Operations management — all modules except system config
Agent management, lead oversight, QA review
Invoices, payments, financial reports, daily closures
Student Portal only — self-service document upload, progress tracking

sections.title: CRM & Lead Pipeline
sections.content: The CRM module manages the entire lead lifecycle from initial capture to conversion. It includes AI-powered scoring, automated assignment, ETL ingestion from multiple channels, and a structured follow-up cadence engine.

rows: Kanban pipeline (6 stages), drag-and-drop stage management
6-component weighted AI scoring (0–100) with conversion probability
Auto round-robin, skill-based routing, manual override
Batch import from spreadsheets, API webhooks, deduplication
Conversion funnels, source attribution, cohort analysis

sections.title: AI Lead Scoring Algorithm
sections.content: Each lead receives an automated score from 0 to 100, driving prioritization and agent allocation.

rows: Email opens, replies, calls answered, events attended
Historical conversion rate of the source channel
Time since last contact (more recent = higher)

sections.title: Visa Rescheduler Bot (Core IP)
sections.content:
The proprietary Visa Rescheduler Bot is the core differentiating technology of the ICE ecosystem. No competitor has automated this process.

How It Works

  1. Credential Intake — Agent registers client credentials securely via HashiCorp Vault encryption
  2. Job Scheduling — BullMQ creates concurrent monitoring jobs with retry logic
  3. Portal Automation — Playwright headless browser logs into US consulate appointment portals
  4. Date Monitoring — System monitors for earlier available appointment slots 24/7
  5. Auto-Reschedule — When a better slot is found, the system automatically reschedules
  6. Notification — Client receives Email/SMS confirmation of the new appointment

rows: Live job monitoring, queue status, success metrics
HashiCorp Vault integration for encrypted storage
BullMQ-powered concurrent jobs with retry logic
Playwright headless automation of consulate portals

callout.title: Competitive Moat
callout.content: This is the proprietary technology that no competitor has. It monitors consulate appointment portals 24/7 and automatically reschedules clients to earlier available dates. The combination of encrypted credential management, headless browser automation, and intelligent retry logic creates a significant barrier to replication.

sections.title: Student Lifecycle Management
sections.content: The Student module manages the complete lifecycle from lead conversion through enrollment, document collection, payment processing, and program completion.

rows: Full profiles with enrollment, payments, documents
Self-service: document upload, progress tracking, GPA view
PENDING → REVIEW → APPROVED pipeline with MinIO storage
Work & Travel, Au Pair, University — with editions
Multi-method (Cash, Transfer, POS, Card) with installments

sections.title: Universal Cashflow & Accounting System
sections.content:
The financial module provides a unified general ledger that automatically synchronizes with all revenue and expense channels across the platform.

Dual-Write Engine

Every student payment automatically creates an accounting transaction. Every payroll disbursement automatically registers as an expense. This ensures real-time financial visibility without manual data entry.

rows: Universal Income/Expense ledger with TRM exchange rates
Auto-invoicing linked to programs and students

callout.title: Key Innovation
callout.content: The dual-write system ensures that payment activity from the Student module, Payroll system, and general accounting are all unified in a single cashflow ledger. This enables instant daily closure and real-time financial visibility across all franchise locations.

sections.title: Enterprise HR & Workforce System
sections.content:
The HR module provides two integrated interfaces: the Employee Portal (self-service for each agent) and the Workforce Command Center (admin dashboard for supervisors).

Automated Payroll Pipeline

  1. Agent status changes (Active, Lunch, Break, Offline) are continuously logged into AgentStatusLog
  2. The payroll API aggregates these logs into billable hours for any period
  3. Pay slips are auto-calculated using the agent's hourly rate
  4. When payroll is approved and marked as PAID, it dual-writes as an EXPENSE in the accounting ledger

rows: 3-tab view: Overview, Payroll & Commissions, Daily Timeline
Auto hour aggregation from status logs → payroll generation
Admin KPIs, department charts, 14-day attendance heatmap
Per-agent commission history with status tracking
Vacation/sick leave requests with approval workflow
Live agent status with timeline visualization

callout.title: Key Innovation
callout.content: Agent status changes are continuously logged. The payroll system automatically reads these logs to compute worked hours, generates pay slips, and when approved, creates an EXPENSE in the accounting ledger — a fully automated payroll-to-ledger pipeline with zero manual data entry.

sections.title: Administrative & Support Modules
sections.content: Additional enterprise modules that support the core business operations.

rows: Internal helpdesk ticketing system with SLA tracking
AI-powered document embeddings for agent assistance

sections.title: Infrastructure & DevOps
sections.content: The platform is self-hosted with enterprise-grade infrastructure that provides full control, zero vendor lock-in, and production-ready reliability.

sections.title: Franchise Replication Readiness
sections.content: The ICE platform is designed from the ground up for franchise replication. Each component required for a new location launch has been either completed or is in active development.

rows: Branded portal with custom domain support

callout.title: Investor Summary
callout.content: ICE Colombia is not a single application — it is a franchise operating system comprising 6 business domains, 30+ interconnected modules, 60+ database models, 50+ API namespaces, 8-tier RBAC, proprietary visa automation, automated payroll-to-ledger pipeline, a 15-chapter operations manual, and a certified training program. The platform is production-grade, revenue-generating, and franchise-ready today.
